title: Ubiquiti U-PRO-MP - Versatile mounting system for UAP-AC-PRO, UAP-AC-HD, UAP-AC-SHD, and above
description: U-PRO-MP universal mounting system is more versatile than standard plastic holders and can be mounted on wall or plastic boxes of different sizes in the wall. The system is compatible with these drives: UAP-AC-PRO UAP-AC-HD UAP-AC-SHD and higher
